firm_notes.noble_strategy: MANUAL EXECUTION MODE (automation banned). live_firm.py runs for signal generation. When signal fires, open Uh-Oh tab → click trade → manually enter in Tradovate. QUALIFYING DAY RULE: Need 5 days each showing $100+ net. PHASE 1 (Day 1-3): 50% size, build qualifying days baseline. PHASE 2 (Day 4-7): Full size, prime sessions only (Tue + Golden Hour). STOP at $300/day — never chase the max. EOD ALARM 3:54pm ET — FLATTEN EVERYTHING. Expected pass: 7-10 trading days. SCALE: Stack 2-3 accounts → 2-3× the income, same Uh-Oh workflow.

T1 NEWS: live_firm.py --prop TOPSTEP auto-flattens 2min before FOMC/NFP/CPI. Expected pass: 3-5 days (Consistency Path), 6-8 days (Standard). OPTIMAL SEQUENCE: Consistency Path + DLL add-on = fastest eval + highest caps.

firm_notes.noble_strategy: MANUAL EXECUTION + INTRADAY TRAILING = double difficulty. Use live_firm.py signals → manually copy to Tradovate UI (Uh-Oh button). INTRADAY TRAILING: Never let a position go up $500 then give it back. Floor rises with unrealized gains. Exit winners quickly (no trailing). Do NOT try to pass in one big day. Spread across 10-15 days. Use the free reset: if first 3 days go wrong, reset immediately. Strategy: $200/day × 6 days = $1,200 (less than target). Need Tuesday golden-hour push. Expected pass time: 12-18 trading days.

firm_notes.noble_strategy: LONG GAME strategy. 15 days minimum = no rushing. CONSISTENCY: Keep any single day under 30% of running eval profit. Example: running $1,500 eval profit → next day max = $450. $200/day average × 15 days = $3,000. Steady wins. Perfect for PAIRS agent (73% WR = consistent daily gains). Use bad weather days (when NQ quiet) to sit out. Expected pass time: 15-20 trading days.

firm_notes.noble_strategy: BEST DD STRUCTURE FOR HIGH-CONVICTION DAYS: Static floor + no DLL. Can take bigger swings without risking daily bust. AUTOMATION: Our custom live_firm.py code qualifies as custom-built (not commercial). CONSISTENCY: 30% eval rule — keep any day under 30% of running eval profit. $300/day × 10 days = $3,000 (under the 30% cap per day). Standard 50%→75%→100% size ramp over 5-7 days. Expected pass time: 8-12 trading days.

firm_notes.noble_strategy: FULL AUTOMATION — run live_firm.py directly. CONSISTENCY RULE (40% eval AND funded): No single day > 40% of total. Example: $1,000 total profit at payout → max any one day = $400. LOW TARGETS: $300/day on 50K is achievable. 10 ACTIVE DAYS: Must trade 10 actual days (not just calendar). Strategy: $150-200/day × 10 days = $1,500-2,000. Tuesday golden hour counts as 1 active day. Keep days balanced — do not let Tuesday swamp the 40% rule. Expected pass time: 10-14 trading days.

Open P&L counts toward trailing floor in real time. Strategy: 1-2 MNQ ONLY. Take profit immediately. Never let a winner give back more than 30%. Session Governor is MORE critical here — only trade HIGH ATR + Tuesday. NEVER hold through macro events (open P&L spike → lower floor). Expected pass time: 10-15 trading days.
